call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Raw JSON input from parent containing the command field

call_outputs.name: error
call_outputs.description: Error message if command missing or invalid

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with send details (channel_id, user_id, message content)

call_outputs.name: result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success, data, message indicating send outcome

internal_leaf_accesses.name: channels
internal_leaf_accesses.description: Read channel membership to validate user is a member

internal_leaf_accesses.name: messages
internal_leaf_accesses.description: Append new message to the channel's message list

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with channel_id for history retrieval

call_outputs.name: result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success, data (list of messages, max 100), message

internal_leaf_accesses.name: messages
internal_leaf_accesses.description: Read messages for the specified channel, limited to 100

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with channel_name for creation

call_outputs.name: result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success, data (channel details), message

internal_leaf_accesses.name: channels
internal_leaf_accesses.description: Read to check uniqueness, write to add new channel

call_inputs.name: input
call_inputs.description: Original input JSON with channel_id and user_id for joining

call_outputs.name: result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success, data, message indicating join outcome

internal_leaf_accesses.name: channels
internal_leaf_accesses.description: Read to verify channel exists and check membership, write to add user

parent_orchestration.description: Parent ChatApp receives input, passes it to ParseCommand to extract command. Based on command, parent passes the original input to the appropriate handler (SendMessage, GetHistory, CreateChannel, or JoinChannel). Each handler returns a result JSON which parent forwards as output.
